chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1577 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For Direction For orders on CMA No.6107/2023 30-11-2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for petitioner/applicant Mr. Nisar Ahmed Phulpoto, Advocate for alleged contemnor Mr. Agha Ather Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for alleged contemnor has produced a copy of cheque of Rs.300,000/- which has already been handed over to petitioner. He further undertakes that remaining amount of Rs.200,000/- would be paid to petitioner on 07.01.2024. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and listed application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
